case_title: TED JEONG VS. RANGER T. CRAFFENS et al

docket_entries.description: UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF JEONG, TED AS TO DEFENDANT CRAFFENS, RANGER T. DEWEILER, LISA DOES 1-10 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE OF COMPLAINT AS TO DEFENDANT DEWEILER, LISA
DECLARATION OF DAILY RENTAL VALUE $32.20 FILED BY PLAINTIFF JEONG, TED
SUMMONS RETURNED FILED BY PLAINTIFF JEONG, TED ON DEFENDANT CRAFFENS, RANGER T.
EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT CRAFFENS, RANGER T.
PROOF OF SERVICE OF SUMMONS, COMPLAINT & PREJUDGMENT CLAIM FILED BY PLAINTIFF JEONG, TED SERVED NOV-16-2002, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT CRAFFENS, RANGER T.
REQUEST TO ENTER DEFAULT FILED/DEFAULT ENTERED AS TO DEFENDANT CRAFFENS, RANGER T.
RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, SATISFIED AS TO REAL PROPERTY ONLY AS TO DEFENDANT CRAFFENS, RANGER T.

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF JEONG, TED RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CRAFFENS, RANGER T. THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 771 A 45 AVE. S.F. CA. 94121, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
